title: OpenEPCIS Electronics Vocabulary Schema
description: JSON Schema for validating Electronics Digital Product Passport data per ESPR Electronics delegated acts. Covers the French Repairability Index (Indice de Réparabilité), the EU Repairability Class (A-E) under Right-to-Repair Directive 2024/1799, WEEE / RoHS compliance, energy labelling (EPREL), software support commitments, and the CIRPASS-2 multi-component bill-of-materials pattern. Version 0.9.6.

ElectronicDevice.title: Electronic Device
ElectronicDevice.description: An electronic device falling under ESPR Electronics delegated acts. Extends gs1:Product / schema:Product with the cross-cutting DPP fields from dpp-core plus the electronics-specific assessments below.

materialDeclaration.description: URL to the full material declaration (e.g. IPC-1752A material composition declaration).

DeviceCategory.title: Device Category
DeviceCategory.description: Top-level device categorisation aligned with the ESPR Electronics delegated-act scope and the WEEE Directive (2012/19/EU) Annex III categories.

RepairabilityIndex.title: Repairability Index
RepairabilityIndex.description: French Repairability Index (Indice de Réparabilité) assessment per the official 5-criteria, 100-point methodology, extended with the EU Repairability Class (A-E) introduced by Right-to-Repair Directive 2024/1799.

totalScore.description: Overall repairability score on the 0-100 scale (0 = least repairable, 100 = most repairable). Required per ESPR repairability-disclosure obligation.

displayScore.description: Score as displayed to consumers on the indicator label (0.0 to 10.0, one decimal). Required.

repairabilityClass.description: EU Repairability Class (A best, E worst) per Right-to-Repair Directive 2024/1799. Required.

repairCriteria.description: Five-criterion breakdown of the repairability assessment. Required.

assessmentDate.description: Date the repairability assessment was carried out. Required.

assessmentBody.description: Identifier of the organisation that performed the assessment (recommend GLN). Required.

repairabilityLabelUrl.description: Resolvable URL to the consumer-facing repairability label artefact. Required.

EURepairabilityClass.title: EU Repairability Class
EURepairabilityClass.description: Repairability grade (A best to E worst) as defined by Right-to-Repair Directive 2024/1799.

RepairCriterion.title: Repair Criterion
RepairCriterion.description: An individual criterion score within the French Repairability Index 5-criterion methodology.

criterionType.description: Which of the five criteria this entry scores. Required.

criterionScore.description: Score achieved on this criterion (≥ 0). Required.

criterionMaxScore.description: Maximum possible score for this criterion under the methodology. Required.

criterionDetails.description: Free-text justification or sub-criterion breakdown for the score.

RepairCriterionType.title: Repair Criterion Type
RepairCriterionType.description: The five French Repairability Index criteria.

SoftwareSupport.title: Software Support
SoftwareSupport.description: Operating-system and firmware support commitments. The EU Right-to-Repair Directive 2024/1799 and ESPR Electronics delegated acts require explicit minimum support periods for security and feature updates.

operatingSystem.description: Operating system name (e.g. Android, iOS, Windows, Linux distribution). Required.

osVersion.description: Operating-system version shipped with the device. Required.

firmwareVersion.description: Firmware version shipped with the device. Required.

securityUpdateEndDate.description: Date until which security updates are committed to be provided. Required.

featureUpdateEndDate.description: Date until which feature updates are committed to be provided. Required.

securitySupportYears.description: Security support period in whole years from placement on the market. Required.

featureSupportYears.description: Feature support period in whole years from placement on the market. Required.

updateChannel.description: Resolvable URL where software updates are published or distributed. Required.

EnergyEfficiency.title: Energy Efficiency
EnergyEfficiency.description: EU Energy Label data per Energy Labelling Framework Regulation 2017/1369 and the relevant product-group delegated acts, plus the EPREL (European Product Registry for Energy Labelling) cross-reference.

energyLabelUrl.description: Resolvable URL to the consumer-facing EU energy-label artefact (the A-G colour scale).

eprelProductUrl.description: EPREL database registry URL for this product.

EnergyEfficiencyClass.title: Energy Efficiency Class
EnergyEfficiencyClass.description: EU Energy Label class (A best, G worst) per Energy Labelling Regulation 2017/1369 rescaled labels.

ComponentBOM.title: Component Bill of Materials
ComponentBOM.description: Bill of Materials for multi-component electronics, supporting the CIRPASS-2 nested-DPP pattern for components.

components.description: Constituent components of the device. Required.

ElectronicComponent.title: Electronic Component
ElectronicComponent.description: An individual electronic component listed in the device's bill of materials.

componentPartNumber.description: Manufacturer-assigned part number for the component.

componentPassport.description: Resolvable URL to the component's own Digital Product Passport (CIRPASS-2 nested-DPP pattern).

ComponentType.title: Component Type
ComponentType.description: Functional component categorisation used in the bill of materials.

ReplacementDifficulty.title: Replacement Difficulty
ReplacementDifficulty.description: How accessible the replacement of this component is.

WEEECompliance.title: WEEE Compliance
WEEECompliance.description: Waste Electrical and Electronic Equipment (WEEE) Directive 2012/19/EU compliance information.

collectionSchemeUrl.description: Resolvable URL to the producer-responsibility collection scheme covering this product.

wasteCode.description: European Waste Catalogue (EWC) code applicable at end of life.

recyclingInstructions.description: Resolvable URL to recycling / dismantling instructions for waste-treatment operators.

WEEECategory.title: WEEE Category
WEEECategory.description: WEEE Directive 2012/19/EU Annex III equipment categories.

RoHSCompliance.title: RoHS Compliance
RoHSCompliance.description: Restriction of Hazardous Substances (RoHS) Directive 2011/65/EU compliance information.

rohsCompliant.description: True if the product complies with the RoHS restricted-substances list.

rohsDeclarationUrl.description: Resolvable URL to the manufacturer's RoHS declaration of conformity.

rohsExemptions.description: List of RoHS Annex III / Annex IV exemption numbers claimed (e.g. "6(c)", "7(a)").

DisplaySpecification.title: Display Specification
DisplaySpecification.description: Display-specific technical specifications for monitors, TVs, and device screens (relevant to the ESPR Electronics display delegated act).

displayTechnology.description: Display technology (e.g. LCD-IPS, OLED, mini-LED, e-ink).

displaySize.description: Diagonal display size, typically expressed in inches.

QuantitativeValue.title: Quantitative Value
QuantitativeValue.description: GS1-idiomatic quantitative value with a numeric magnitude and a UN/CEFACT Recommendation 20 unit code.

unitCode.description: UN/CEFACT Recommendation 20 unit code (e.g. KWH for kilowatt-hour, HTZ for Hertz, INH for inch, CDL for candela per square metre).
